words.answer: How are you feeling today?
Can we walk slower?
I like this park.
Do you want to sit on the bench?

words.hint: Masz ochotę na kawę po spacerze?
words.answer: Do you want a coffee after the walk?

Look how green it is here!
Maybe we’ll take this path?
Aren’t you cold?

words.hint: Podoba mi się, jak spędzamy czas razem.
words.answer: I like how we spend time together.
Did you hear those birds?
I’d like to walk more often.
Shall we take a picnic next time?
Are you happy?
I love talking together.
Look at these beautiful flowers!

words.hint: Masz ochotę pójść w innym kierunku?
words.answer: Do you want to go in a different direction?
Hug me.
Thank you for this walk.
You look beautiful today.
Are you tired?
Give me your hand.

Let’s not hurry.
Walking together is a great idea.
I’d like more moments like this.

I love you.

words.hint: Jakie są twoje plany na jutro?
words.answer: What are your plans for tomorrow?
I like your dress.

words.hint: Chciałbym, żeby ten spacer trwał dłużej.
words.answer: I’d like this walk to last longer.
You can hear the rustling of leaves.

words.hint: Zabierzesz mnie kiedyś w swoje ulubione miejsce?
words.answer: Will you take me to your favorite place someday?

Our moments together are most precious.

words.hint: Czy podoba ci się ten zapach kwiatów?
words.answer: Do you like the smell of these flowers?

The sun is slowly setting.

I feel safe with you.

words.hint: Masz ochotę na lody albo kawę?
words.answer: Do you want some ice cream or coffee?

words.hint: Czy nie jest ci za gorąco?
words.answer: Aren’t you too hot?

words.hint: Chciałbym zatrzymać ten moment na dłużej.
words.answer: I’d like to keep this moment longer.

words.hint: Często myślę o naszych wspólnych podróżach.
words.answer: I often think about our travels together.

words.answer: I can’t imagine my life without you.

words.answer: Can you imagine living in this area?
